data_description.weather_entity: Weather integration used for hourly forecasts and as fallback for current conditions (e.g. weather.home, weather.meteo_france).
data_description.sensor_outdoor_temperature: If set, this sensor's reading is used instead of the weather entity's current temperature (e.g. sensor.ambient_temperature).
data_description.sensor_wind_speed: If set, this sensor's reading is used instead of the weather entity's current wind speed (e.g. sensor.ambient_wind_speed).

error.weather_incompatible: Weather entity does not support forecasts
error.invalid_time_sequence: Heating stop hour must precede target hour

data_description.name: Integration name
data_description.weather_entity: Weather integration used for hourly forecasts and as fallback for current conditions (e.g. weather.home, weather.meteo_france).
data_description.sensor_outdoor_temperature: If set, this sensor's reading is used instead of the weather entity's current temperature (e.g. sensor.ambient_temperature).
data_description.sensor_wind_speed: If set, this sensor's reading is used instead of the weather entity's current wind speed (e.g. sensor.ambient_wind_speed).

start_heating_cycle.name: Start Heating Cycle
start_heating_cycle.description: Starts a new daily heating cycle, placing the state machine in HEATING_ON mode.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

stop_heating.name: Stop Heating
stop_heating.description: Stops heating and starts the nightly monitoring phase (HEATING_ON → DETECTING_LAG → MONITORING).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

start_recovery.name: Start Recovery
start_recovery.description: Starts the heating recovery phase to reach the target temperature at wake-up time (MONITORING → RECOVERY).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

end_recovery.name: End Recovery
end_recovery.description: Ends the recovery phase, calculates RPth, and returns to normal heating mode (HEATING_PROCESS → HEATING_ON).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

get_state.name: Get State
get_state.description: Returns the current state machine state with all details (temperatures, times, thermal coefficients, active modes).

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

reset_learning.name: Reset Learning
reset_learning.description: Resets all learned thermal coefficients (RCth, RPth) to their default values.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).

trigger_calculation.name: Trigger Calculation
trigger_calculation.description: Manually triggers an immediate recalculation of the recovery time.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID (optional, uses first available if not specified).
